query.userQuestion: AAPL 未来三个月值不值得买？

reportSections.title: Final Judgment
reportSections.content: AAPL looks investable on the fixture path, but entry timing still depends on execution and sentiment staying stable. Updated objects: Thesis(thesis:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:core), Risk(risk:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:execution), MacroActorAction(macroactoraction:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:policy_rates), LiquidityFactor(liquidityfactor:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:rates_pressure), LiquidityRegime(liquidityregime:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:primary), MarketSignal(marketsignal:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:price_positioning).

reportSections.title: Core Thesis
reportSections.content: AAPL Holdings still supports a credible medium-term fundamental thesis. Recent news flow on AAPL is constructive but not strong enough to remove execution risk. Updated objects: Thesis(thesis:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:core), Risk(risk:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:execution).

reportSections.title: Supporting Evidence
reportSections.content: AAPL Holdings still supports a credible medium-term fundamental thesis. Liquidity backdrop is stable. This does not contradict the long case for AAPL. AAPL price action is constructive without looking fully crowded.

reportSections.title: Key Risks
reportSections.content: Recent news flow on AAPL is constructive but not strong enough to remove execution risk. Updated objects: Thesis(thesis:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:core), Risk(risk:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:execution).

reportSections.title: Liquidity Context
reportSections.content: Rates pressure is manageable and liquidity conditions are not actively tightening. Liquidity backdrop is stable. This does not contradict the long case for AAPL. Updated objects: MacroActorAction(macroactoraction:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:policy_rates), LiquidityFactor(liquidityfactor:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:rates_pressure), LiquidityRegime(liquidityregime:case:AAPL:buy_decision:3m:primary).

reportSections.title: What Changes The View
reportSections.content: The view would weaken if execution deteriorates, liquidity turns restrictive, or market positioning becomes obviously crowded.

reportSections.title: Judgment Evolution
reportSections.content: First analysis for AAPL — no prior judgment on record. This run establishes the baseline thesis and judgment for future comparison.
